summary: Upgraded Niri compositor with floating windows, visual polish (shadows, rounded corners), enhanced Waybar with workspace icons and modules, screenshot annotation tools, and kanshi monitor management. All changes maintain GNOME Desktop compatibility.

artifacts.summary: Added xwayland-satellite, fuzzel, wdisplays packages and power-profiles-daemon service
Added satty/grim/slurp packages, enhanced Waybar with icons and modules, added kanshi monitor management
Updated Niri config with prefer-no-csd, shadows, rounded corners, floating keybindings, and window rules
Implementation summary documenting all Niri upgrades and new features

completion_data.completion_summary: Implemented comprehensive Niri compositor upgrades including floating window support (Mod+W), visual enhancements (shadows, rounded corners, prefer-no-csd), enhanced Waybar with workspace icons and bluetooth/idle modules, screenshot annotation pipeline (grim+slurp+satty), and kanshi dynamic monitor management. GNOME Desktop compatibility fully maintained.

next_steps: Apply changes with nixos-rebuild switch, then test floating windows and screenshot annotation in Niri session
